name: Hand Print Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 packages refrigerator sugar cookie dough rolls
Flour for board and rolling pin
Various icings in tubes from supermarket
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each sugar cookie dough roll in half.
2. Form each into a ball and flatten into a disk. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate about 45 minutes until firm.
3. Draw and cut out hand shapes of family members to use as guides for making cookies.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (check temperature on cookie dough package).
5. Working with one dough ball at a time on a floured board, roll out to about 1/4 inch thick. Use enough flour so the dough isn't sticky and can be easily removed to the cookie sheet.
6. Place paper hand cut-out on dough and trace with a sharp knife, making cookie hands.
7. Place cookies on baking sheets and bake until light golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely on racks before decorating.
9. Decorate using icings and candies. You can even write family members' names on each. This is the fun part to do with kids!
